info.title: Intervu API
info.description: Job platform API: candidate/recruiter auth, resume management, job postings, applications, and an AI Resume Assistant (RAG). All routes are mounted under /api. Authenticated routes read this app's own signed JWT from an httpOnly cookie set at login. Every response is wrapped in a consistent envelope: {"success": true, "data": <the schema documented per endpoint below>} on success, or {"success": false, "error": "<message>"} on failure — the per-endpoint schemas below document the shape of the data field specifically, not the outer envelope. The one exception is GET /api/openapi.json itself, which returns this raw specification document unwrapped so it stays importable as a standalone spec.

Profile.description: Candidate or recruiter profile row — shape varies by role.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not authorized for this role/resource

post.summary: Register a new account (Cognito) — sends a confirmation code by email
Confirm signup with the emailed code
Email+password login — sets the httpOnly session cookie

get.summary: Current session — user, active role, and every role this account has set up

post.summary: Change which profile (candidate/recruiter) is active for this account

get.summary: Google OAuth callback — sets the session cookie and redirects home
GitHub OAuth callback — sets the session cookie and redirects home
Get the current account's profile for a role

post.summary: Create or update the profile for a role
Extract structured profile fields from an uploaded resume PDF (AI-powered autofill)

422.description: Couldn't read any text from that file

post.summary: Add a resume to the candidate's library

get.summary: Fetch one resume from the candidate's library, including its file data

put.summary: Replace a resume in the candidate's library in one step (new filename + file, same id)

delete.summary: Delete a resume from the candidate's library

post.summary: AI Resume Assistant — RAG-grounded, cited answer. Personalizes against the caller's resume if logged in (or one attached directly).

get.summary: Public jobs board — search/filter/paginate open postings
Companies with the most open postings right now, aggregated from real job rows
The current recruiter's own postings (open and closed), paginated and searchable
Recruiter dashboard stats: applicant totals by status, top companies, interview completion rate
Single job detail (public — works for closed jobs too)

patch.summary: Edit a job posting, including closing/reopening it (recruiter, own posting only)

get.summary: Paginated, searchable applicants to one of the recruiter's own postings (list rows omit the resume blob)
Full detail for a single applicant, including their resume — fetched on demand, not as part of the list

patch.summary: Set an applicant's status and/or leave structured interview feedback

get.summary: Directory of every candidate profile (recruiter only), paginated
The current candidate's own applications — search/filter/sort/paginate

post.summary: Apply to a real posting (jobId) or log one made off-platform (company+position)

resumeId.description: Which resume from the candidate's library to attach, if any

get.summary: Recent notification-worthy activity for the current candidate (applied / status changed)

patch.summary: Edit a manually-logged application (job_id null only — real postings are recruiter-owned, use /withdraw instead)

403.description: This application is to a real posting — only the recruiter can change its status

delete.summary: Delete a manually-logged application (job_id null only)

403.description: Applications to a real posting can only be withdrawn, not deleted

patch.summary: Withdraw an application to a real posting — preserves the row (and any recruiter feedback) instead of deleting it
